zh.lifeSummary: 當William Stones於1577年11月2日出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親John Aston Stone49歲，母親Agnes Katerine Barton47歲。他和Judith Brown至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1609年6月20日享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沙普萊斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Stones于1577年11月2日出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲John Aston Stone49岁，母亲Agnes Katerine Barton47岁。他和Judith Brown至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1609年6月20日享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾沙普萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Stones
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of Stone with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. A number of the places called Stone are sometimes recorded with plural spellings in the medieval period, including Stone (Staffordshire), recorded as Stanes in 1187.

variants.name: Stone
meanings: English: from Middle English ston(e) ‘stone, rock’ (Old English stān). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on stony ground, by a notable outcrop of rock, or by a stone boundary-marker or monument, or habitational, from a place called Stone, such as those in Buckinghamshire, Devon, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Staffordshire, and Worcestershire.
Irish (Kilkenny): adopted for Irish Ó Clochartaigh (see Clougherty ) and/or Ó Clochasaigh (see Clohessy ), and possibly several other names containing or thought to contain the element cloch ‘stone’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of various surnames in other languages, meaning ‘stone’, including Jewish Stein , Norwegian Steine, French Lapierre .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Stones was born on 2 November 1577, in England, United Kingdom, his father, John Aston Stone, was 49 and his mother, Agnes Katerine Barton, was 47. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Judith Brown. He died on 20 June 1609, at the age of 31, and was buried in Sharples, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Stones est né le 2 novembre 1577, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Aston Stone, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Agnes Katerine Barton, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Judith Brown. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1609, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Sharples, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Stones am 2. November 1577 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Aston Stone 49 und seine Mutter Agnes Katerine Barton 47. Er hatte mit Judith Brown mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juni 1609 im Alter von 31 Jahren und wurde in Sharples, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Stones è nato il il 2 novembre 1577 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Aston Stone, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Katerine Barton, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Judith Brown. Morì il 20 giugno 1609, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Sharples, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Stonesが1577年11月2日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John Aston Stoneは49歳，母Agnes Katerine Bartonは47歳であった。彼はJudith Brownとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1609年6月20日に31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアシャルプレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Stones(이)가 1577년 11월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Aston Stone(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Katerine Barton(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Judith Brown(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 6월 20일 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샤르플레스에 묻혔다.

pt.2 November 1577–20 June 1609: 2 de novembro de 1577–20 de junho de 1609
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Stones nasceu em 2 de novembro de 1577, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Aston Stone, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Katerine Barton, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Judith Brown. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1609, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Sharples, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Stones родился 2 ноября 1577 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Aston Stone было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Katerine Barton, 47. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Judith Brown. Он умер 20 июня 1609 г. в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности шарплесь, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.2 November 1577–20 June 1609: 2 de noviembre de 1577–20 de junio de 1609
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Stones nació el 2 de noviembre de 1577, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Aston Stone, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Agnes Katerine Barton, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Judith Brown. Murió el 20 de junio de 1609, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Sharples, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
